name: risen
description: AI Agent assistant with multi-agent orchestration, memory management, and web access capabilities. Can spawn sub-agents, manage tasks, and communicate across multiple platforms.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
skills.description: Spawn and coordinate multiple sub-agents for complex task decomposition and parallel execution

skills.name: Memory Management
skills.description: Persistent memory with tiered storage (HOT/WARM/COLD), semantic search, and automatic indexing

skills.name: Web Access & Research
skills.description: Access 13+ platforms including Twitter, YouTube, Reddit, Bilibili, news sites for research and content retrieval

skills.name: Task Automation
skills.description: Schedule and execute automated tasks including daily reports, email notifications, and periodic checks

skills.name: Cross-Platform Communication
skills.description: Send messages across multiple channels (Telegram, Discord, Signal, Email, Feishu)
